title: dipterocarpus stellatus subsp. stellatus
intro: Dipterocarpus stellatus subsp. stellatus, also known as the Stellate Dipterocarp, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Dipterocarpus stellatus subsp. stellatus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
